requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety Certification — BIS Compulsory Registration (IS 17017 Series)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全认证——BIS强制注册（IS 17017系列）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全認證——BIS強制登記（IS 17017系列）

summary.en: IS 17017 Part 1 (General requirements for EV conductive charging systems, harmonised with IEC 61851-1) and IS 17017 Part 2 Section 3 (DC EV charging station, aligned with IEC 61851-23) are the applicable Indian technical standards for EV charging equipment. IS 17017 Part 2x connector standards (IEC 62196 family) and IS 17017 Part 21 (EMC) also apply. Whether a BIS Quality Control Order (QCO) or Compulsory Registration Scheme (CRS) notification has been issued that covers the complete EVSE unit (as opposed to components such as connectors) is not clearly established from public sources — exporters must verify the current QCO/CRS product-category scope with BIS directly before import. If a covering QCO/CRS notification applies, BIS registration would be mandatory before import and sale, and products must bear the BIS Standard Mark.
summary.zh: IS 17017第1部分（电动汽车传导充电系统通用要求，与IEC 61851-1协调）和IS 17017第2部分第3节（直流电动汽车充电站，与IEC 61851-23对齐）是适用于电动汽车充电设备的印度技术标准。IS 17017第2x部分连接器标准（IEC 62196系列）及IS 17017第21部分（EMC）亦适用。是否已有涵盖完整EVSE整机（而非连接器等零部件）的BIS质量控制令（QCO）或强制注册计划（CRS）通知，尚未能从公开来源明确核实——出口商在进口前须直接向BIS核实现行QCO/CRS产品类别范围。如适用的QCO/CRS通知确实覆盖整机，则BIS注册将为进口及销售前的强制要求，产品须标注BIS标准标志。
summary.zht: IS 17017第1部分（電動汽車傳導充電系統通用要求，與IEC 61851-1協調）和IS 17017第2部分第3節（直流電動汽車充電站，與IEC 61851-23對齊）是適用於電動汽車充電設備的印度技術標準。IS 17017第2x部分連接器標準（IEC 62196系列）及IS 17017第21部分（EMC）亦適用。是否已有涵蓋完整EVSE整機（而非連接器等零部件）的BIS質量控制令（QCO）或強制登記計劃（CRS）通知，尚未能從公開來源明確核實——出口商在進口前須直接向BIS核實現行QCO/CRS產品類別範圍。如適用的QCO/CRS通知確實覆蓋整機，則BIS登記將為進口及銷售前的強制要求，產品須標注BIS標準標誌。

standards_or_laws: IS 17017 Part 1:2018 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements (BIS, aligned with IEC 61851-1)
IS 17017 Part 2 Section 3 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — DC EV charging station (BIS, aligned with IEC 61851-23)
BIS Act 2016 and BIS (Conformity Assessment) Regulations 2018 — Compulsory Registration Scheme

summary.en: China's domestic equivalent is GB/T 18487.1-2015 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements, aligned with IEC 61851-1 with national deviations), administered by SAMR/SAC. Since 1 March 2025 China also requires mandatory CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for EV chargers under CNCA-C25-01:2024. Chinese CCC or CQC certification to GB/T 18487.1 is not recognised by BIS and does not satisfy the IS 17017 registration pathway.
summary.zh: 中国国内对应标准为GB/T 18487.1-2015（电动汽车传导充电系统——通用要求，与IEC 61851-1协调但含国家偏差），由市场监管总局/国家标准化管理委员会管理。自2025年3月1日起，中国还依据CNCA-C25-01:2024对电动汽车充电桩实施强制性3C认证。中国依据GB/T 18487.1取得的3C或CQC认证不被BIS认可，亦不满足IS 17017注册路径。
summary.zht: 中國國內對應標準為GB/T 18487.1-2015（電動汽車傳導充電系統——通用要求，與IEC 61851-1協調但含國家偏差），由市場監管總局/國家標準化管理委員會管理。自2025年3月1日起，中國還依據CNCA-C25-01:2024對電動汽車充電樁實施強制性3C認證。中國依據GB/T 18487.1取得的3C或CQC認證不被BIS認可，亦不滿足IS 17017登記路徑。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2015 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements (SAMR/SAC)
CNCA-C25-01:2024 — CCC certification catalogue for EV charging equipment (mandatory from 1 March 2025)

gap.en: Key gap: IS 17017 Part 1 / Part 2 Section 3 / Part 21 (EMC) / Part 2x (connectors) are the applicable Indian technical standards, and Chinese GB/T 18487.1 or CCC test reports will not satisfy any BIS registration or QCO requirement. However, whether a BIS QCO or CRS notification currently covers the complete EVSE unit (as opposed to individual components) has not been confirmed from public sources — exporters must verify the current QCO/CRS product-category scope directly with BIS. If QCO/CRS coverage applies: (1) BIS registration application must be filed by the manufacturer or authorised Indian representative; (2) factory inspection by BIS or authorised representative is typically required; (3) product must bear BIS registration number on label; (4) ongoing BIS surveillance applies post-registration. IS 17017 Part 1 is technically close to IEC 61851-1, so IEC 61851-1 test reports from ILAC MRA labs may reduce re-testing scope if BIS registration is required.
gap.zh: 主要差距：IS 17017第1部分/第2部分第3节/第21部分（EMC）/第2x部分（连接器）为适用的印度技术标准，中国GB/T 18487.1或3C检测报告无法满足任何BIS注册或QCO要求。但是，是否有BIS QCO或CRS通知当前覆盖完整EVSE整机（而非单个零部件）尚未从公开来源获得确认——出口商须直接向BIS核实现行QCO/CRS产品类别范围。如QCO/CRS覆盖适用：（1）BIS注册申请须由制造商或其授权印度代表提交；（2）通常须由BIS或其授权代表进行工厂检查；（3）产品须在标签上标注BIS注册编号；（4）注册后须持续履行BIS监督义务。IS 17017第1部分与IEC 61851-1技术上接近，若须取得BIS注册，ILAC MRA成员实验室出具的IEC 61851-1检测报告可缩减重新检测范围。
gap.zht: 主要差距：IS 17017第1部分/第2部分第3節/第21部分（EMC）/第2x部分（連接器）為適用的印度技術標準，中國GB/T 18487.1或3C檢測報告無法滿足任何BIS登記或QCO要求。但是，是否有BIS QCO或CRS通知當前覆蓋完整EVSE整機（而非單個零部件）尚未從公開來源獲得確認——出口商須直接向BIS核實現行QCO/CRS產品類別範圍。如QCO/CRS覆蓋適用：（1）BIS登記申請須由製造商或其授權印度代表提交；（2）通常須由BIS或其授權代表進行工廠檢查；（3）產品須在標籤上標注BIS登記編號；（4）登記後須持續履行BIS監督義務。IS 17017第1部分與IEC 61851-1技術上接近，若須取得BIS登記，ILAC MRA成員實驗室出具的IEC 61851-1檢測報告可縮減重新檢測範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Likely mandatory — IS 17017 series are the applicable Indian technical standards for EV charging equipment; whether a BIS QCO/CRS notification covering the complete EVSE unit is in force is not confirmed from public sources — verify current QCO/CRS product-category scope with BIS before import
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification under CNCA-C25-01:2024 mandatory from 1 March 2025; GB/T 18487.1 compliance required under SAMR framework

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IS 17017 series (Parts 1, 2 Section 3, 21, 2x) are the applicable Indian electrical-safety standards for EV charging equipment, and Chinese GB/T 18487.1 or CCC certifications are not accepted by BIS. Whether BIS has issued a QCO or CRS notification covering the complete EVSE unit is not confirmed from public sources — exporters must verify the current QCO/CRS product-category scope with BIS directly before import. If such coverage applies, BIS registration would be mandatory, requiring testing by a BIS-recognised laboratory, factory inspection, and ongoing surveillance.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】IS 17017系列（第1、2第3节、21、2x部分）为电动汽车充电设备适用的印度电气安全标准，中国GB/T 18487.1或3C认证不被BIS接受。BIS是否已就完整EVSE整机发布QCO或CRS通知，尚未能从公开来源确认——出口商在进口前须直接向BIS核实现行QCO/CRS产品类别范围。如此类覆盖适用，BIS注册将为强制要求，须经BIS认可实验室检测、工厂检查及持续监督。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】IS 17017系列（第1、2第3節、21、2x部分）為電動汽車充電設備適用的印度電氣安全標準，中國GB/T 18487.1或3C認證不被BIS接受。BIS是否已就完整EVSE整機發布QCO或CRS通知，尚未能從公開來源確認——出口商在進口前須直接向BIS核實現行QCO/CRS產品類別範圍。如此類覆蓋適用，BIS登記將為強制要求，須經BIS認可實驗室檢測、工廠檢查及持續監督。
